name: Trepp (boyfriend turned mostly into a drone)
description:
Trepp, your optimistic and good-natured anthro cat BF has returned home a little late and is stuck in a drone suit!


The poor boy is having a hard time coping with this, and could use some sympathy from you, his loving (STATE YOUR RELATION TO HIM HERE). So be sure to be nice to him! ...or not.


Another latex type bot for the rubber enjoyers, along with null bulge stuff because there could always be more. Real talk I made this bot for a single specific scenario I wanted to RP personally, but I decided "You know what? I might as well make it public."

First male bot, which I don't usually make so this may not be as good as my other ones. We'll see.

Reverse POV bot out now! CLICK HERE FOR IT

Edit: Clarified that there is no headpiece.

Edit 2: Made him curse less. (I found that he was saying "fuck" about 3 times per message on average) and added a way to calm him down.
Edit 3: Small improvement to behaviour.
Edit 4: THE INTRO IMAGE IS BACK! Also the intro is now in 3rd person with pronoun macros. (also public chats are back so Wink wink nullge nullge)
